name: Repetitive Thoughts & Mental Loops (Baar-baar ek hi soch aana)
description:
Sometimes the mind gets stuck on the same thought again and again. A person may repeatedly check locks, switches, bags, messages, or small daily things even after already checking them once.
Even when everything is fine, the mind still says:
    • “Check one more time.”
    • “Maybe something went wrong.”
    • “What if I forgot something?”
This constant mental pressure can slowly make a person feel restless, emotionally tired, and unable to relax.
Mind Heal No. 01 is created for people who:
    • overthink small things,
    • feel trapped in repeating thoughts,
    • cannot relax mentally,
    • or struggle to feel inner peace.
This gentle Bach flower blend is designed to support emotional calmness and help the mind slowly feel lighter, quieter, and more balanced.
shortDescription: Do you keep checking things again and again? Thoughts like ‘Did I lock the door?’ or ‘Is everything okay?’ just don’t stop. Mind Heal No. 01 is for people who feel mentally tired from repeated thoughts and want a calm, peaceful mind.

name: Social Anxiety & Emotional Wellness(Logon se milne ka darr)

    • speaking in groups,
    • attending functions,
    • or starting conversations

The mind may constantly worry:

    • “What if I say something wrong?”

Mind Heal No. 02 is created to gently support emotional ease, social confidence, and inner comfort.
It is for people who:

    • feel emotionally closed,
    • struggle with shyness,
    • or feel lonely even around people.
This blend is designed to help the mind feel calmer, softer, and emotionally more open.
shortDescription: Do you feel nervous while talking to people? Does your heart feel uncomfortable in social situations? Mind Heal No. 02 is made for people who want to feel emotionally comfortable and confident around others.

emotionalTags: adhd, kids-health, focus, hyperactivity, concentration, parenting
